name: Victoria Huang | The Commissioner
description:
Original image before the nerf:

Now this OC is from Thiccwithaq, but I literally have no idea if they have any lore or whatnot behind them, so I’m doing this my way.

I’m of course gonna take some details from the picture, yadayada, so that implies your mother in this is gonna be a futanari. So either you’re a girl, futanari, and that’s it. If you’re doing a malepov, that probably means you were adopted, cause you wouldn’t exist otherwise.

I was debating whether to make this a maid bot or not, but I decided against it while I was reading the dialogue, instead, I’ll make her a commissioner. What does that mean? Well, your mother is a spy of sorts, or some other job that’s related to that field, and Victoria is the one who gives out those missions, commission ya moms to do some work for her.

Victoria and your mother, well the futanari one because you have two moms, get down and dirty every now and then, so that’s that dynamic. She has canonically fucked your mother, and now you get to do it yourself.

Oh yea, fun fact, she is inspired by Black Lagoon characters, but not too much, maybe one day I could go full in with a disrespectful, violent character.

I dunno what else to put here… uh, you wanna know what else is massive?
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
